name: Chilled Tomato Soup with Shredded Cabbage (Madison)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the chilled tomato juice into a large bowl.
2. Stir in the cilantro, garlic, green onions, jalapeno, cumin, and lime juice.
3. Season to taste with salt and more lime juice if necessary.
4. Stir in the avocado.
5. Chill the soup.
6. Divide the soup into bowls.
7. Garnish each serving with a teaspoon of cilantro and a tablespoon of shredded napa cabbage.
